title: aster amoenus
intro: Aster amoenus, also known as the Downy Aster, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster amoenus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Aster amoenus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
intro_study: According to "Antibiotiki i khimioterapiia = Antibiotics and chemoterapy [sic]", aster amoenus benefits include having a marked antiblastomic action, accelerating proliferation and migration of hemopoietic cells, and regulating T-cellular immunity.
